title: Business Specialist
required_skills: 2-3 years of experience in dental/3D printing business
missing_skills: Sales support and business proposal preparation
core_responsibilities: Support Account Managers in developing and executing growth strategies for the 3D printing portfolio
Conduct market and customer analysis to identify new business opportunities
Prepare sales materials, product presentations, and business proposals
Prepare performance reports and provide insights to improve sales effectiveness
Assist in organizing demos, webinars, and trade events; collaborate with technical teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight market intelligence and competitive analysis experience from Minth Group (EMEA/APAC coverage)
Emphasize cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder coordination from Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC roles
Showcase performance reporting and executive dashboard experience as proxy for sales effectiveness insights
Frame business development work at ECE Group as relevant to growth strategy support
Stress English fluency and international multi-market experience (EMEA, APAC)

company_info.size_raw: 326 Total employees (LinkedIn hiring insights embedded in job page)
